sub_modules.multich_conv2d_index_decode: Combinationally decodes the flattened output index into output channel, row, and column coordinates.
sub_modules.multich_conv2d_window_mac: Combinationally forms the channel-aware K by K window from the stored image tensor and computes the dot product with the selected output-channel kernel.
sub_modules.multich_conv2d_postprocess: Combinationally adds the selected output-channel bias and clamps the result to OUT_W bits.
sub_modules.multich_conv2d_done_logic: Combinationally reports when the programmed number of output pixels has been emitted.
